children.name: hwL2vpnVcType
children.description: This object indicates the PW encapsulation type. The value 0 is invalid.

children.name: hwL2vpnOutLabel
children.description: This object indicates the outgoing label of a PW. The value 0 is invalid.

children.name: hwL2vpnIfName
children.description: This object indicates the name of an AC interface. The value null is invalid.

children.name: hwL2vpnServiceType
children.description: This object indicates the PW type (VPWS or VPLS).

children.name: hwL2vpnInLabel
children.description: This object indicates the incoming label of a PW. The value 0 is invalid.

children.name: hwL2vpnProtocolType
children.description: This object indicates the protocol used by a PW (static, LDP, or BGP).

children.name: hwL2vpnVcID
children.description: This object indicates the PW ID. The value 0 is invalid.

children.name: hwL2vpnIfIndex
children.description: This object indicates the index of an AC interface. The value 0 is invalid.

children.name: hwL2vpnVsiName
children.description: This object indicates a VSI name. The value null is invalid.

children.name: hwL2vpnOamType
children.description: This object indicates the OAM type, MPLS OAM or MPLS-TP OAM.
